title: Easy Dark Mode Admin Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Dark Mode Admin Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#090a0f`
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='100' width='360' height='180' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='150' y='20' width='120' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='300' y='20' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='25' y='35' fill='#fff' fontSize='18'>Login Form</text><text x='220' y='35' fill='#fff' fontSize='18'>Dark Mode Toggle</text><text x='35' y='120' fill='#fff' fontSize='24'>Admin Dashboard</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates for the dark mode toggle and login form fields
Implement form field validation for the password field

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Dark Mode Admin Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers for the dark mode toggle and login form fields.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
